name: flutterhelm
description: Run FlutterHelm as a repo-local Codex plugin with stable local workflows and opt-in beta companion guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Run stable FlutterHelm workflows and opt into beta companions
interface.longDescription: Use FlutterHelm as a repo-local plugin for stable Flutter workspace, session, run, test, profile, and native handoff workflows. The default plugin path starts only FlutterHelm; beta companion MCP setup for runtime interaction and native build lives in bundled skills.
defaultPrompt: Use FlutterHelm to set up this repo and run a stable local debug and test loop
Use FlutterHelm to diagnose a failing run_app or test workflow in this repo
Show me how to enable FlutterHelm beta runtime interaction or native build safely
